10.t: For while they be folden together

12.t: yet thus shall they be cut down

13.t: from off thee and will burst

14.t: concerning thee that no more of thy name

15.t: of him that bringeth good tidings
thee he is utterly cut off

4.t: they shall justle one against another

8.t: shall they cry but none shall look back

13.t: Behold I am against thee saith

5.t: Behold I am against thee saith

6.t: upon thee and make thee vile

7.t: And it shall come to pass that all they that look

19.t: over thee for upon whom hath not thy wickedness
